37217c89-185.name: MH370航班失踪事件
37217c89-185.summary: 马来西亚航空公司MH370航班的失踪事件

attributes.description: MH370航班失踪事件，涵盖事件时间线、技术数据、残骸发现记录、调查结论、争议假说及最新搜寻进展

38ecf188-cdb.name: 马来西亚航空公司
38ecf188-cdb.summary: 马来西亚的航空公司，运营MH370航班

attributes.description: 马来西亚航空公司，拥有并运营MH370航班

cca1745d-83a.name: MH370航班
cca1745d-83a.summary: 从吉隆坡到北京的航班; 马来西亚航空MH370航班，波音777飞机。

attributes.description: 波音777-200ER型客机，注册编号9M-MRO，于2014年3月8日凌晨0时41分从吉隆坡国际机场起飞，原定于北京时间6时30分抵达北京首都国际机场

a1fffed1-4f9.name: 吉隆坡国际机场
a1fffed1-4f9.summary: 吉隆坡国际机场（KLIA）; MH370起飞的机场。

attributes.description: MH370航班的起飞地点
MH370航班的预定抵达地点

5f3c1325-8fa.name: MH370 Flight
5f3c1325-8fa.summary: Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 from Kuala Lumpur to Beijing, involving a Boeing 777-200ER aircraft.; Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370 from Kuala Lumpur to Beijing.; The flight event of Malaysia Airlines Flight MH370, including its path and disappearance.; Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 involved in the events.; Malaysia Airlines Flight 370 that disappeared.

attributes.description: Aircraft registration 9M-MRO, delivered to Malaysia Airlines on 2002-05-31, with 53,465.21 cumulative flight hours. Age 11 years 9 months as of disappearance. Max range 14,685 km, max fuel capacity 171,160 liters (49,100 kg). Carried 239 people: 227 passengers and 12 crew members.

dc006c3b-ab0.name: Kuala Lumpur International Airport
dc006c3b-ab0.summary: Departure airport for MH370 flight, also known as KLIA.

attributes.description: Located in Kuala Lumpur, where MH370 flight took off.

21e9ed96-d99.name: Beijing Capital International Airport
21e9ed96-d99.summary: Scheduled arrival airport for MH370 flight.

attributes.description: Located in Beijing, where MH370 flight was scheduled to arrive at 06:30 Beijing time.

5b5af923-0f5.name: Malaysia Airlines
5b5af923-0f5.summary: Airline operating the MH370 flight and owning the aircraft.; The airline operating MH370

attributes.description: Received delivery of the aircraft (registration 9M-MRO) on 2002-05-31.
53 years old, total flight time 18,365 hours, including 8,659 hours on Boeing 777.
27 years old, total flight time 2,763 hours, undergoing Boeing 777 transition training.

c9978f3c-f27.name: Pria Nour Mohammad Mehrad
c9978f3c-f27.summary: Iranian passenger who used a fake passport

attributes.description: 19 years old, used a stolen Austrian passport to board MH370.

6fbdf5fc-88e.name: Delavar Seyed Mohammad Reza
6fbdf5fc-88e.summary: Iranian passenger who used a fake passport

attributes.description: 29 years old, used a stolen Italian passport to board MH370.
Investigated the fake passport incident and confirmed the passengers were illegal immigrants.
Shipped the lithium-ion batteries on MH370.
Brand of the lithium-ion batteries loaded on MH370.

a4d78ccc-860.name: MH370
a4d78ccc-860.summary: Malaysia Airlines Flight 370; 涉及事件的特定航班; Malaysia Airlines Flight 370.; 马来西亚航空MH370航班

attributes.description: Specific flight event involving the aircraft and journey details mentioned in the text.
Stolen passport used by Pria Nour Mohammad Mehrad to board MH370.
Stolen passport used by Delavar Seyed Mohammad Reza to board MH370.
Interpol's Stolen and Lost Travel Documents database, used for tracking stolen passports.
221 kg of Motorola brand batteries, shipped by FedEx Logistics and loaded on MH370, which caused controversy.
4,566 kg of fresh mangosteens loaded in the front cargo hold of MH370, which caused controversy.

c712814e-e23.name: Fake Passport Boarding Event
c712814e-e23.summary: Event involving boarding with fake passports

attributes.description: Event where two Iranian passengers used stolen passports to board MH370, later confirmed as illegal immigration by Interpol.
Event that exposed the failure of Malaysian airport security to conduct real-time checks with the SLTD database.
Intended transit point for the passengers traveling to Europe.
Location where the fake passport boarding occurred and the security vulnerability was exposed.

45dec963-5c3.name: 机长模拟飞行
45dec963-5c3.summary: 机长扎哈里在2014年3月7日进行的飞行模拟。

attributes.description: 在家中的飞行模拟器上进行，模拟航线后来被FBI恢复。

6b9eb8d1-b63.name: 山竹果货物
6b9eb8d1-b63.summary: 5吨新鲜山竹果装在MH370货舱前部。

attributes.description: 可能释放水汽加剧火灾风险。

a45fa8f8-d7b.name: 锂离子电池货物
a45fa8f8-d7b.summary: 221公斤摩托罗拉品牌锂离子电池。

attributes.description: 托运由飞达物流公司，可能发生热失控。
马来西亚当局未公开详细说明。

dbb038cc-a13.name: 飞达物流公司
dbb038cc-a13.summary: 托运锂离子电池的公司。

attributes.description: 进行了模拟飞行。
在波音777机型上的第5次飞行。

746323e4-480.name: 模拟航线数据
746323e4-480.summary: 从机长硬盘恢复的模拟飞行数据。

attributes.description: 显示从吉隆坡起飞、飞越马六甲海峡、转向南印度洋的航线，与MH370实际路径吻合。
恢复了机长硬盘中的模拟数据。

d9a03666-eab.name: 锂离子电池热失控风险
d9a03666-eab.summary: 锂离子电池可能发生热失控的风险。

attributes.description: 在特定条件下，可能加剧火灾风险。
与锂离子电池热失控混合可能加剧火灾风险。

bbe0c06d-d71.name: ACARS Report
bbe0c06d-d71.summary: Last automatic data report from MH370 at 01:07 MYT.

attributes.description: Contained normal engine performance and fuel consumption data.

27f2c4be-664.name: Transponder Disabling
27f2c4be-664.summary: Manual shutdown of MH370's transponder at 01:20:36 MYT.

attributes.description: Conscious cockpit operation causing signal loss at IGARI waypoint.

6d710bf3-f3f.name: Final Radio Communication
6d710bf3-f3f.summary: Last radio message from MH370 at 01:19:24 MYT.

attributes.description: Co-pilot Fariq replied 'Good night, Malaysian Three Seven Zero' to air traffic control.
Sent the final radio communication.

999c8b10-265.name: Kuala Lumpur ATC
999c8b10-265.summary: Air Traffic Control center in Kuala Lumpur.; Air traffic control organization in Kuala Lumpur responsible for MH370 handover.; Air traffic control in Kuala Lumpur

attributes.description: Instructed MH370 to contact Ho Chi Minh ATC.

64796ff6-37f.name: Ho Chi Minh ATC
64796ff6-37f.summary: Air Traffic Control center in Ho Chi Minh.; Air traffic control organization in Ho Chi Minh that should have been contacted.; Air traffic control in Ho Chi Minh City

attributes.description: Designated next contact point for MH370.

9dd7d23c-77b.name: IGARI Waypoint
9dd7d23c-77b.summary: Boundary between Malaysian and Vietnamese flight information regions.; Navigation waypoint where aircraft turn occurred.

attributes.description: Location where transponder was disabled.

06a8791d-e38.name: Transponder Manual Shutdown
06a8791d-e38.summary: Manual shutdown of the aircraft's transponder requiring conscious cockpit action.

attributes.description: The transponder was manually shut down, not due to equipment failure, as determined by investigation.

70470d21-43e.name: ADS-B Signal Loss
70470d21-43e.summary: Interruption of ADS-B signal causing the aircraft to disappear from civilian radar.

attributes.description: ADS-B signal was interrupted simultaneously, leading to loss from civilian radar screens.

f628a7fc-cff.name: ACARS Report Failure
f628a7fc-cff.summary: Failure of the ACARS system to send scheduled data reports.

attributes.description: ACARS did not send the next scheduled 30-minute data report as planned.

edabee4c-3c8.name: Main Power Bus Cutoff
edabee4c-3c8.summary: Cutting off the main power bus leading to multiple system failures.

attributes.description: The main power bus was cut off, causing ACARS and other systems to lose power simultaneously, requiring knowledge of Boeing 777 electrical systems.

1f758761-ed5.name: Aircraft Sharp Turn
1f758761-ed5.summary: Sharp left turn of nearly 180 degrees by the aircraft.

attributes.description: Aircraft made a sharp left turn near IGARI waypoint, changing direction to southwest and then northwest.

c30779a2-ed4.name: Altitude Fluctuation
c30779a2-ed4.summary: Significant altitude changes during the flight.

attributes.description: Aircraft climbed to 45,000 feet (exceeding normal limit) and descended to 23,000 feet, indicating large altitude variations.

a765caf1-e04.name: Aircraft Disappearance
a765caf1-e04.summary: Final disappearance from all radar monitoring.

attributes.description: Aircraft last appeared on radar over the Andaman Sea, northwest of Penang Island, before complete loss of contact.

7e9f4e33-ed6.name: Investigation Findings
7e9f4e33-ed6.summary: Findings from the investigation into transponder shutdown.

attributes.description: Evidence from investigation indicating transponder was manually shut down through conscious action.

3f7ce820-e28.name: ACARS Analysis
3f7ce820-e28.summary: Analysis indicating main power bus cutoff as cause of ACARS failure.

attributes.description: Analysis showed ACARS failure was due to main power bus cutoff, not isolated shutdown.

f6940684-a4a.name: Military Radar Data
f6940684-a4a.summary: Data from military radar tracking the aircraft's path.

attributes.description: Radar data captured flight trajectory, turn, and altitude changes, used to interpret events.
Malaysia's air force, responsible for radar tracking at Kota Bharu and West Malaysia stations.

15702eba-605.name: Malay Peninsula
15702eba-605.summary: Geographic area flown over by aircraft.

attributes.description: Peninsula over which aircraft flew southwest after the turn.

40cb6db7-496.name: Strait of Malacca
40cb6db7-496.summary: Body of water along which aircraft flew northwest.; Strait between Malay Peninsula and Sumatra.

attributes.description: Strait where aircraft flew after crossing Malay Peninsula.
Island approximately 200 nautical miles northwest of the final radar contact.

92a13f1a-51a.name: Andaman Sea
92a13f1a-51a.summary: Sea where aircraft last appeared on radar.; Location over which MH370 flew northwest after radar loss.

attributes.description: Location of final radar contact before aircraft disappearance.

6bc70ceb-9b5.name: 卫星握手信号阶段
6bc70ceb-9b5.summary: MH370航班通过Inmarsat卫星数据单元进行的自动通信事件序列

attributes.description: 飞机在02:25至08:19 MYT期间与Inmarsat-3 F1卫星进行的一系列自动握手通信，成为追踪飞行路径的唯一线索。

660823f6-7f6.name: SDU重启事件
660823f6-7f6.summary: 飞机卫星数据单元在02:25的异常重启事件

attributes.description: 机载Inmarsat卫星数据单元(SDU)在02:25重新上电并与卫星完成登录握手，表明辅助动力装置或主发动机恢复供电，这在正常飞行中不会发生。

9b4b087b-4e3.name: Inmarsat SDU
9b4b087b-4e3.summary: 飞机上的卫星数据单元硬件

attributes.description: 机载Inmarsat卫星数据单元(SDU)，用于自动生成握手信号。

ebe6fd30-116.name: Inmarsat-3 F1卫星数据
ebe6fd30-116.summary: 印度洋上空的卫星记录的通信数据

attributes.description: 由位于东经64.5度地球静止轨道的Inmarsat-3 F1卫星记录的6次整点握手信号（时间：02:25, 03:41, 04:41, 05:41, 06:41, 08:11 MYT）。

f5130afb-046.name: 安达曼海上空
f5130afb-046.summary: 飞机最后出现在军用雷达的位置

attributes.description: 槟城岛西北约200海里处的空域，飞机在此脱离雷达监控。

933d8825-e4d.name: 印度洋上空
933d8825-e4d.summary: 卫星握手信号发生的地理位置

attributes.description: Inmarsat-3 F1卫星所在轨道的覆盖区域，握手信号在此记录。

3d69056d-5b6.name: APU
3d69056d-5b6.summary: 飞机的辅助动力装置状态

attributes.description: 辅助动力装置，可能在02:25恢复对SDU的供电。

e093fd8c-25b.name: 主发动机
e093fd8c-25b.summary: 飞机主发动机的供电状态

attributes.description: 主发动机，可能在02:25恢复对SDU的供电。
运营Inmarsat-3 F1卫星的组织，提供数据单元服务。

8ded0c64-35b.name: Sixth Handshake Signal
8ded0c64-35b.summary: The sixth handshake signal at 08:11 that defined the Seventh Arc.

attributes.description: Handshake signal recorded by satellite, producing BTO data used to define the Seventh Arc for MH370 Flight.

1f78ad2a-bfb.name: BTO Data
1f78ad2a-bfb.summary: Burst Timing Offset data from handshake signals, used to calculate distance from satellite.

attributes.description: Data derived from handshake signals indicating the distance between the aircraft and satellite, enabling the definition of geographic arcs like the Seventh Arc.

85f1736f-705.name: BFO Data
85f1736f-705.summary: Burst Frequency Offset data from handshake signals, indicating aircraft velocity and direction.

attributes.description: Data derived from handshake signals using Doppler effect to reflect the aircraft's movement, such as speed and descent direction.

9a1767c4-5c2.name: Seventh Arc
9a1767c4-5c2.summary: The equal distance arc defined by the last normal communication BTO data.; Geographic arc at the time of the last normal handshake, spanning southern Indian Ocean.

attributes.description: Geographic arc centered on the satellite's sub-point, representing the location of MH370 Flight during its last normal communication at 08:11.

f87beeaa-2ca.name: Abnormal Handshake Request
f87beeaa-2ca.summary: An incomplete handshake request at 08:19, indicating fuel exhaustion and descent.

attributes.description: Abnormal satellite signal suggesting brief power-on of systems due to fuel exhaustion, with BFO data indicating high-speed descent; considered the final signal from MH370 Flight.

9c001388-80a.name: Fuel Exhaustion
9c001388-80a.summary: Condition where aircraft fuel is depleted, leading to auxiliary systems activation.; Condition where aircraft fuel is depleted.; The condition of fuel running out.

attributes.description: Analysis indicates that fuel exhaustion caused the APU to start briefly, triggering the abnormal handshake signal.

965acdca-0b7.name: APU Brief Start
965acdca-0b7.summary: Brief activation of the Auxiliary Power Unit due to residual fuel.

attributes.description: Temporary start of the APU using residual or gravity-fed fuel, which led to the Satellite Data Unit powering on and the abnormal handshake signal.

4bf8a68c-7b6.name: SDU Power On
4bf8a68c-7b6.summary: Satellite Data Unit briefly powering on.

attributes.description: Event where the SDU received power from the APU start, resulting in the abnormal handshake request being recorded.

e85136fa-a11.name: High-Speed Descent
e85136fa-a11.summary: Aircraft descending at high speed, indicated by BFO data.

attributes.description: Condition reflected by BFO data from the abnormal handshake, showing the aircraft was in a rapid descent phase.

ee168859-2d1.name: Air Traffic Control Failure
ee168859-2d1.summary: Failure by Kuala Lumpur ATC to confirm handover completion.

attributes.description: Serious lapse where Kuala Lumpur ATC instructed MH370 Flight to contact Ho Chi Minh ATC but did not verify if the handover was completed as per procedure.
Attempted to contact MH370 via ACARS.
Kuala Lumpur ATC did not confirm if handover to Ho Chi Minh ATC was completed after instructing MH370.
Ho Chi Minh ATC noticed MH370 did not report but only inquired internally without activating emergency procedures.

a5baf727-111.name: ACARS Contact Attempt
a5baf727-111.summary: Attempt to contact MH370 via ACARS

attributes.description: Malaysia Airlines Operations Center tried to contact MH370 with no response.
Ho Chi Minh ATC formally notified Kuala Lumpur ATC that MH370 had not made contact.
Malaysia Airlines announced MH370 was missing more than 4 hours after last communication.

c90e59a6-161.name: Search Operation Launch
c90e59a6-161.summary: Commencement of search and rescue operations

attributes.description: Search operation started nearly 5 hours after disappearance.
Report that criticized the delay in search operation.

6a6f7b54-31f.name: Inmarsat Satellite Data
6a6f7b54-31f.summary: Satellite communication data from Inmarsat; Satellite communication data used for analysis.

attributes.description: Data used for tracking and analysis of MH370 flight path, including BTO and BFO.
Delay of nearly 5 hours in launching search operations after disappearance, criticized in the report.

31ce262f-4f6.name: BFO
31ce262f-4f6.summary: Burst Frequency Offset data used for tracking aircraft movement based on Doppler shift.

attributes.description: Data reflecting Doppler shift caused by aircraft and satellite motion; used to determine flight direction (north or south).

f05ae0c2-bfd.name: Second Handshake
f05ae0c2-bfd.summary: The second handshake event in satellite communication.

attributes.description: Starting point from which BFO values consistently indicated southward flight.

c197b146-47c.name: Aircraft Flying South
c197b146-47c.summary: Condition of the aircraft flying in a southerly direction.

attributes.description: Flight direction inferred from BFO data analysis, excluding northern routes.

78b1b104-c10.name: Northern Route
78b1b104-c10.summary: Hypothetical flight path via Central Asia towards Kazakhstan.

attributes.description: Potential northern path excluded by BFO data indicating southward flight.

30261f9f-c10.name: Last Normal Handshake
30261f9f-c10.summary: Final normal satellite handshake of MH370 at 08:11 MYT.

attributes.description: Event defining the seventh arc location.

0f2fd043-348.name: Crash Area
0f2fd043-348.summary: Most probable area where MH370 crashed, between 34°S and 38°S on the seventh arc.

attributes.description: Region narrowed down using BFO data, aircraft performance parameters, and wind field data.

6e90e957-402.name: Aircraft Performance Parameters
6e90e957-402.summary: Parameters such as cruise speed and fuel consumption rate used in analysis.

attributes.description: Data including cruise speed and fuel consumption rate used to determine crash area.

88e365b0-987.name: Wind Field Data
88e365b0-987.summary: Wind data used in flight path and crash area analysis.

attributes.description: Wind conditions data incorporated into crash area determination.

855c1ea6-3dd.name: Investigators
855c1ea6-3dd.summary: Individuals conducting the analysis and reconstruction.

attributes.description: Key personnel involved in analyzing data and reconstructing events.

2e9f7c25-bb1.name: 08:19 Abnormal Signal
2e9f7c25-bb1.summary: Abnormal satellite signal at 08:19 MYT with BFO value of -2 Hz.

attributes.description: Final abnormal communication signal indicating descent.

a182e25f-674.name: Descent Rate
a182e25f-674.summary: Condition of aircraft descending at approximately 15,000 feet per minute.

attributes.description: High descent rate consistent with BFO value of -2 Hz.

66ed4364-b2f.name: Uncontrolled Descent
66ed4364-b2f.summary: Event of uncontrolled high-speed dive or spiral descent.

attributes.description: Descent phase triggered by fuel exhaustion.

e978c5d6-4cf.name: Flight Path Reconstruction
e978c5d6-4cf.summary: Reconstruction of MH370's flight path after radar loss.

attributes.description: Event where investigators rebuilt the probable flight path based on satellite data.

b4f029e2-b6a.name: 02:22 Radar Loss
b4f029e2-b6a.summary: Loss of military radar contact at 02:22.

attributes.description: Event marking the end of radar tracking.

28182441-3b3.name: 02:25 SDU Reboot
28182441-3b3.summary: Satellite Data Unit reboot event around 02:25.

attributes.description: Approximate time when SDU reboot occurred, possibly related to turn south.

d3b844a9-8d9.name: Turn to South
d3b844a9-8d9.summary: Event where aircraft turned to a southerly heading.

attributes.description: Turn occurring around the time of SDU reboot, leading to flight across Indian Ocean.

8248c026-255.name: Indian Ocean
8248c026-255.summary: Geographic region where MH370 flew southward.

attributes.description: Ocean traversed by MH370 on southerly heading.

1fd6b933-79d.name: Southern Turn Event
1fd6b933-79d.summary: The event where MH370 turned to a southerly heading.

attributes.description: MH370 turned south and flew across the Indian Ocean in a stable flight mode.

45a28f6a-130.name: First Stage Search
45a28f6a-130.summary: Search operation in South China Sea and Strait of Malacca.

attributes.description: Initial search focused near IGARI waypoint in South China Sea, involving 25 countries with over 160 aircraft and ships, covering 92,600 sq km, no debris found.

8369a3a0-1ca.name: Second Stage Search
8369a3a0-1ca.summary: Surface search in southern Indian Ocean.

attributes.description: Search led by AMSA in southern Indian Ocean southwest of Perth, covering over 4.6 million sq km, with suspected floating objects found but not confirmed.

bb0a6761-865.name: South China Sea IGARI Waypoint
bb0a6761-865.summary: Location near IGARI waypoint in South China Sea.

attributes.description: Last known position of MH370, focus of initial search.

929f074e-6da.name: Southern Indian Ocean
929f074e-6da.summary: Ocean area southwest of Perth, Australia.

attributes.description: Area of the second stage search, approximately 2,500 km southwest of Perth.
Organization that led the second stage search operation.

4f4ba80d-412.name: Chinese Navy Task Force
4f4ba80d-412.summary: Chinese naval forces participating in the search.

attributes.description: Participated in the second stage search with other nations.
Analysis that indicated the flight path and led to redirection of search efforts.

77d10c06-f0d.name: 海底搜索行动
77d10c06-f0d.summary: 澳大利亚交通安全局主导的海底搜索行动，使用拖曳式声呐设备和自主水下航行器，在南印度洋第七弧线附近进行系统性扫描。

attributes.description: 搜索面积达120,000平方公里，水深3,000-6,000米，耗资约2亿澳元（约1.5亿美元），发现了两艘19世纪沉船残骸，但未找到MH370的任何部件。

669746f4-255.name: ATSB
669746f4-255.summary: 澳大利亚交通安全局，主导了海底搜索行动。

attributes.description: 负责组织和执行人类历史上最大规模的水下搜索行动。

38980bf8-fdd.name: 南印度洋第七弧线
38980bf8-fdd.summary: 海底搜索行动的发生地点，位于南印度洋附近。

attributes.description: 搜索区域的具体地理位置。

36ab8089-617.name: 19世纪沉船残骸
36ab8089-617.summary: 在海底搜索行动中发现的物理残骸，属于19世纪沉船。

attributes.description: 作为证据被发现，但未确认与MH370事件相关。

2c9196ea-437.name: Ocean Infinity搜索行动
2c9196ea-437.summary: 美国深海探测公司Ocean Infinity与马来西亚政府合作进行的海底搜索行动，使用旗舰船'海底建造者号'和8台AUV。

attributes.description: 搜索区域位于此前官方搜索区域以北，覆盖约112,000平方公里，以'无果不付费'协议进行，未找到飞机残骸。

cddef0f1-84f.name: Ocean Infinity
cddef0f1-84f.summary: 美国深海探测公司，执行了Ocean Infinity搜索行动。

attributes.description: 使用旗舰船'海底建造者号'进行作业，如果找到残骸，将获得最高7,000万美元报酬。

c4b2bdb1-6c9.name: 马来西亚政府
c4b2bdb1-6c9.summary: 与Ocean Infinity签订协议，参与Ocean Infinity搜索行动。

attributes.description: 作为合作方，支持搜索行动。

f2951080-b94.name: 官方搜索区域以北
f2951080-b94.summary: Ocean Infinity搜索行动的发生地点，位于此前官方搜索区域的北部。

attributes.description: 搜索覆盖约112,000平方公里的区域。

36d71e29-e7d.name: 襟副翼
36d71e29-e7d.summary: MH370的右翼襟副翼残骸，部件编号657BB，属于波音777-200ER

attributes.description: 在法属留尼汪岛圣安德烈海滩发现，后缘呈锯齿状撕裂，表明撞击水面时受力巨大；表面附着藤壶，生长模式用于推算漂流时间；是MH370坠入印度洋的第一个物理证据
在坦桑尼亚奔巴岛发现，事发时处于收起状态而非着陆构型，对'机长控制水上迫降'假说构成挑战

f00153d4-c68.name: 襟副翼发现事件
f00153d4-c68.summary: 襟副翼残骸的发现事件

attributes.description: 在法属留尼汪岛圣安德烈海滩发现襟副翼残骸

8340b486-8df.name: 外侧襟翼发现事件
8340b486-8df.summary: 外侧襟翼残骸的发现事件

attributes.description: 在坦桑尼亚奔巴岛发现外侧襟翼残骸

0cc745ff-9cb.name: 留尼汪岛
0cc745ff-9cb.summary: 襟副翼残骸的发现地点

attributes.description: 法属留尼汪岛圣安德烈海滩，襟副翼残骸的发现位置

7688c934-470.name: 奔巴岛
7688c934-470.summary: 外侧襟翼残骸的发现地点

attributes.description: 坦桑尼亚奔巴岛，外侧襟翼残骸的发现位置
负责确认襟副翼残骸属于MH370的组织
参与确认襟副翼残骸属于MH370的组织

67c17514-fbf.name: 机长控制水上迫降假说

attributes.description: 高度可能属于MH370，发现于莫桑比克维兰库洛海滩。
高度可能属于MH370，发现于南非。
2016年10月确认属于MH370，发现于毛里求斯，是第三块正式确认的残骸。
高度可能属于MH370，发现于马达加斯加海岸，此前被渔民当作洗衣板使用约5年；状态表明飞机坠海时起落架可能处于放下状态。

4da71313-012.name: VilankuloBeach
4da71313-012.summary: 莫桑比克维兰库洛海滩

attributes.description: 水平安定面碎片的发现地点。
发动机整流罩碎片的发现地点。

476ff914-bdf.name: Mauritius
476ff914-bdf.summary: 毛里求斯; Geographic location where debris was discovered

attributes.description: 内饰面板碎片的发现地点。
左起落架耳轴门部件的发现地点。
所有已发现残骸的分布区域，包括留尼汪岛、坦桑尼亚、莫桑比克、马达加斯加、南非和毛里求斯。
基于左起落架耳轴门部件的状态推断，表明飞机坠海时起落架可能处于放下状态。
先前发现（文本中提及），与起落架放下状态形成矛盾。
失联航班，所有残骸均高度可能或确认属于此航班。
飞机可能在坠落过程中经历的事件，由起落架放下与襟翼收起的矛盾暗示。

e86c0050-42f.name: MH370 Debris
e86c0050-42f.summary: Physical debris recovered from MH370 flight

attributes.description: Debris found in the western Indian Ocean, including locations such as Réunion Island, Tanzania, Mozambique, Madagascar, South Africa, and Mauritius.

9bd4ba7c-ee8.name: Réunion Island
9bd4ba7c-ee8.summary: Geographic location where debris was discovered

attributes.description: Island in the Indian Ocean; one of the sites where MH370 debris was found.

9ff266f0-36c.name: Tanzania
9ff266f0-36c.summary: Geographic location where debris was discovered

attributes.description: Country on the eastern coast of Africa; one of the sites where MH370 debris was found.

6b4a2975-e1c.name: Mozambique
6b4a2975-e1c.summary: Geographic location where debris was discovered

attributes.description: Country on the eastern coast of Africa; one of the sites where MH370 debris was found, near the Mozambique Channel.

a4799a88-bd8.name: Madagascar
a4799a88-bd8.summary: Geographic location where debris was discovered

attributes.description: Island nation in the Indian Ocean; one of the sites where MH370 debris was found.

232e061d-e7c.name: South Africa
232e061d-e7c.summary: Geographic location where debris was discovered

attributes.description: Country on the southern tip of Africa; one of the sites where MH370 debris was found.
Warm ocean current in the South Indian Ocean that transports floating objects from east to west, dispersing them around Mozambique Channel and Madagascar to the African coast.
Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation; performed drift model analysis to support the MH370 crash hypothesis.

7184b902-7e3.name: Drift Model Analysis
7184b902-7e3.summary: Ocean drift model used for crash hypothesis

attributes.description: Model based on reverse calculation of ocean currents, using debris discovery times and locations to infer crash site.

5603efe3-5e9.name: MH370 Crash Hypothesis
5603efe3-5e9.summary: Hypothesized crash event of MH370 flight

attributes.description: Hypothesis that MH370 crashed in the southern Indian Ocean between 32°S and 36°S latitude on the seventh arc.
Australian oceanographer who performed a physical drift experiment using replica debris.
Experiment using a real aircraft wing section shaped like the flaperon found on Réunion Island, equipped with a positioning system and released into Indian Ocean currents.

d67d99e5-bc4.name: Boeing
d67d99e5-bc4.summary: Aircraft manufacturer providing materials for experiment

attributes.description: Company that supplied the real aircraft wing used in the drift experiment.

f9ba1275-c9a.name: Replicated Debris
f9ba1275-c9a.summary: Replica debris used in drift experiment

attributes.description: Physical replica of MH370 debris created for the drift experiment; its drift trajectory was compared to real debris patterns.
495-page final report released by the Malaysian investigation team, containing conclusions on the MH370 incident.
Team that conducted the MH370 investigation and published the final report.

eea954b9-db4.name: Human-Controlled Yaw
eea954b9-db4.summary: Event of aircraft turn and yaw under human control

attributes.description: Conclusion that MH370's turn and yaw were human-controlled, with possible third-party interference but no evidence of remote control.

ac3bc3c3-e8d.name: Pilot No Anomaly Evidence
ac3bc3c3-e8d.summary: Evidence indicating no anomalies in pilots

attributes.description: Evidence showing that the captain and co-pilot held valid licenses, were in good health, and had adequate rest, with no signs of anomalies.
Individual who piloted MH370; described as having a valid license, good health, and sufficient rest.
Individual who co-piloted MH370; described as having a valid license, good health, and sufficient rest.

7a313fc8-b5c.name: OWNED_BY
7a313fc8-b5c.fact: MH370航班飞机由马来西亚航空公司拥有。

df07ca25-1d3.name: LOCATED_AT
df07ca25-1d3.fact: MH370航班于2014年3月8日凌晨0时41分从吉隆坡国际机场起飞。

ed8d3c11-7cd.name: LOCATED_AT
ed8d3c11-7cd.fact: MH370航班原定于北京时间6时30分抵达北京首都国际机场。

a7262157-4bc.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
a7262157-4bc.fact: 马来西亚航空公司参与了MH370航班失踪事件。

488890c8-589.name: LOCATED_AT
488890c8-589.fact: MH370 flight took off from Kuala Lumpur International Airport.

e85bd73b-b92.name: LOCATED_AT
e85bd73b-b92.fact: MH370 flight was scheduled to arrive at Beijing Capital International Airport.

8e91c453-bb8.name: OWNED_BY
8e91c453-bb8.fact: The aircraft used in MH370 flight is owned by Malaysia Airlines.

64d4b8e3-615.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
64d4b8e3-615.fact: Pria Nour Mohammad Mehrad participated in the fake passport boarding event by using a stolen Austrian passport.

e2a9debc-1a2.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
e2a9debc-1a2.fact: Delavar Seyed Mohammad Reza participated in the fake passport boarding event by using a stolen Italian passport.

b6b604e5-04b.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
b6b604e5-04b.fact: Zaharie Ahmad Shah participated in the MH370 flight event as the captain.

27b3f5e0-420.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
27b3f5e0-420.fact: Fariq Abdul Hamid participated in the MH370 flight event as the co-pilot.

b026b969-68e.name: SUPPORTED_BY
b026b969-68e.fact: The fake passport boarding event is supported by the evidence of the stolen Austrian passport used by Pria Nour Mohammad Mehrad.

5551886f-020.name: SUPPORTED_BY
5551886f-020.fact: The fake passport boarding event is supported by the evidence of the stolen Italian passport used by Delavar Seyed Mohammad Reza.

7a50ab67-a35.name: REPORTED_BY
7a50ab67-a35.fact: The fake passport boarding event was reported by Interpol, which confirmed the passengers were illegal immigrants.

86c4ff83-cac.name: CAUSED_BY
86c4ff83-cac.fact: The security vulnerability exposure event was caused by the fake passport boarding event, which revealed the failure to use the SLTD database.

a2a28cc3-080.name: LOCATED_AT
a2a28cc3-080.fact: The fake passport boarding event occurred at the Malaysian Airport location.

20140e84-c2a.name: OWNED_BY
20140e84-c2a.fact: The lithium-ion batteries evidence is owned by the Motorola organization, as they are branded by Motorola.

856b5236-93d.name: OWNED_BY
856b5236-93d.fact: 锂离子电池由飞达物流公司托运。

088544bb-dcf.name: SUPPORTED_BY

94bc68f0-ed2.name: SUPPORTED_BY

14751535-962.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
14751535-962.fact: 机长扎哈里参与了模拟飞行事件。

d0370d94-612.name: SUPPORTED_BY

c2b010cd-0ae.name: LOCATED_AT
c2b010cd-0ae.fact: MH370 Flight took off from Kuala Lumpur International Airport.

512b9507-0cf.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
512b9507-0cf.fact: Co-pilot Fariq participated in the final radio communication event.

278fa8d0-a22.name: REPORTED_BY
278fa8d0-a22.fact: Final radio communication was reported by Kuala Lumpur ATC.

d6898302-e66.name: SUPPORTED_BY
d6898302-e66.fact: MH370 Flight's normal status at 01:07 MYT is supported by ACARS Report evidence.

d653d5b9-f15.name: LOCATED_AT

f8f54d67-63c.name: TRIGGERED_BY

de824d84-32d.name: PRECEDED_BY
de824d84-32d.fact: Final Radio Communication event preceded the Transponder Disabling event.

0a65eaea-f56.name: SUPPORTED_BY
0a65eaea-f56.fact: The manual shutdown of the transponder is supported by evidence from investigation findings.

bbfda7a1-c49.name: CAUSED_BY

3cf58c16-052.name: SUPPORTED_BY
3cf58c16-052.fact: The event of main power bus cutoff is supported by analysis evidence of ACARS failure.

92cfaa46-639.name: LOCATED_AT

37134c45-b9d.name: SUPPORTED_BY
37134c45-b9d.fact: The occurrence of the aircraft sharp turn is supported by military radar data evidence.

ae9e5845-b8a.name: SUPPORTED_BY
ae9e5845-b8a.fact: The altitude fluctuations of the aircraft are supported by military radar data evidence.

8ab03142-08d.name: LOCATED_AT

1f351f18-55c.name: REPORTED_BY
1f351f18-55c.fact: The military radar data evidence was reported by the Royal Malaysian Air Force organization.

933d8c9f-b76.name: PRECEDED_BY
933d8c9f-b76.fact: The ACARS report failure event occurred after the ADS-B signal loss event, based on timestamps.

641daca7-6f6.name: PRECEDED_BY
641daca7-6f6.fact: The aircraft disappearance event occurred after the aircraft sharp turn event, based on timestamps.

dfb75310-a28.name: TRIGGERED_BY

70bee85e-ffe.name: TRIGGERED_BY

954aeada-7c8.name: SUPPORTED_BY

0d5169b4-c27.name: PRECEDED_BY

38fb5d73-a72.name: PRECEDED_BY

7849564e-29f.name: PRECEDED_BY

bf7ca283-b07.name: PARTICIPATED_IN

8ce43a40-fcc.name: SUPPORTED_BY

3e4cccd6-210.name: SUPPORTED_BY

4534d22b-6e0.fact: Investigators participated in reconstructing the flight path.

b91aafd8-f5a.fact: 水平安定面碎片属于MH370航班。

713eac4f-5c5.fact: 发动机整流罩碎片属于MH370航班。

b128d0e5-df2.name: OWNED_BY
b128d0e5-df2.fact: 内饰面板碎片属于MH370航班。

019afe1a-f0c.name: OWNED_BY
019afe1a-f0c.fact: 左起落架耳轴门部件属于MH370航班。

ae29bf74-d46.name: SUPPORTED_BY
ae29bf74-d46.fact: The distribution pattern of MH370 debris is supported by the South Equatorial Current.

205b2cf2-af3.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
205b2cf2-af3.fact: CSIRO participated in conducting the drift model analysis.

6e8e0ad5-c8f.name: SUPPORTED_BY
6e8e0ad5-c8f.fact: The MH370 crash hypothesis is supported by the drift model analysis.

4354a82a-ddb.name: PARTICIPATED_IN
4354a82a-ddb.fact: Dr. Griffin participated in conducting the drift experiment.

3be3dbd1-24b.name: OWNED_BY
3be3dbd1-24b.fact: The replicated debris is owned by Boeing, as it was obtained from them.

43e1d72c-5da.name: SUPPORTED_BY
43e1d72c-5da.fact: The discovery pattern of MH370 debris is supported by the drift trajectory of the replicated debris.

187cf35a-0be.name: REPORTED_BY
187cf35a-0be.fact: The Malaysia final report is reported by the Malaysian Aircraft Accident Investigation Team.

a4d4a52b-eb3.name: SUPPORTED_BY
a4d4a52b-eb3.fact: The event of human-controlled yaw is supported by the Malaysia final report.

8962b5f5-f92.name: SUPPORTED_BY
8962b5f5-f92.fact: The evidence of no pilot anomalies is supported by the Malaysia final report.
